description: CompositionWhite scooped neck top made of 100% cotton, with gathers at the side hems and chest print with sequinsFittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub Tunic tops not only make you look slim but they also camouflage those unwnated curves, highlighting only the goodies. While the soft chest print with discreet sequins makes the top a regular wear, the tank style with the blousy silhouette enhances your well-toned arms, neck and shoulders.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
